title: Mattikkiten Lyrics Padai Veeran
stanzas:
haiyyaiyo Mattikkiten
unkitta maatikitten
valikkaama kaattikitten
kanavedhu nijamedhu
theriyala

nee enna suththi vitta
engengo paththa vachacha
kannukkul kaththi vachcha
killi killi paathapinnum
puriyala..

sanda poatu paathiruppa
sandhi kuthira saanji ninnu
paathiyaa

kaththi pesi pathiruppa
kalli poovu kannadichu
paathiyaa

a kokku nee
un kezhuththi naan
enai koththi kotharida
kaththi katharida
kammaa karaiyila
yaemaa nuzhaiyira nee

haiyyaiyo Mattikkita
unkitta maatikitta
valikkaama kaattikitta
kanavedhu nijamedhu
theriyala

nee unna suththi vitten
engengo paththa vachachen
kannukkul kaththi vachchen
kannukkul kaththi vachchen
puriyala..

pongi thirinja pottapulla.
ponnaa paathaa nenjukulla
nikkuraa

panju virinja kaattukulla
kanniponnu kanga thookki
vaikkuraa

naan singaari
en sirippu thee
en pattu seelaiya
suththi erinthida
valaiyaa vizhuguthu
dhisaiyaa maraikuthadaa

enkitta sakthiyilla
unnapol puthiyilla
thirudittaa pottapulla
kanda kanda kanavula
alaiyuren

kolasaami kovilukku
kurumbaadu naenthu vitten
kaappaatha vaendikitten
thidai edhu vazhi edhu
theriyala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mattikkiten?

The song Mattikkiten expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the feelings of the characters in the movie.

What is the context of this song in the movie Padai Veeran?

This song plays a significant role in showcasing the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of the film.

Who are the singers of Mattikkiten?

The song is sung by the talented Haricharan and Rita, whose voices complement each other beautifully.

Who composed the music for Mattikkiten?

The music for Mattikkiten was composed by Karthik Raja, known for his melodious tunes.

When was Mattikkiten released?

The song was released on April 21, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mattikkiten, the heartfelt lyrics convey a sense of yearning and love, perfectly encapsulating the emotions of the characters in Padai Veeran. The song's soothing melody, brought to life by Haricharan and Rita, creates an intimate atmosphere that resonates with listeners. It beautifully portrays the complexities of love, making it a perfect choice for romantic occasions. The evocative imagery in the lyrics enhances the overall emotional experience, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mattikkiten is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Haricharan and Rita, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and melody. Experience the magic of Padai Veeran as it takes you on a heartfelt journey through its captivating lyrics and soulful composition.
stanzaMeanings: Oh no, I have changed because of you. I can't show my feelings, and I don't know if my dreams are real or not.
What have you done? Where have you gone? I feel like a bird trapped in my eyes, and I still can't understand.
Oh no, I have changed. Oh no, I have changed.
I will keep my anger aside. The horse is tied, are you half of it?
The knife speaks, and I am waiting. The flower is blooming, are you half of it?
You, with your words, have cut me deeply. The knife is sharp, and you are hiding your true self.
Oh no, I have changed because of you. I can't show my feelings, and I don't know if my dreams are real or not.
You have left me, and I feel lost. I feel like a knife is stuck in my eyes, and I still can't understand.
I have fallen and turned around. When I look at you, my heart is restless.
In the beautiful garden, the girl is being admired and taken away.
I am a singer, my smile is like fire. My song is a trap, and it is hidden in the direction I go.
I have no strength like you. I feel like a thief caught in dreams, creating waves.
I have offered my prayers at the temple, but I don't know which way to go or what to do.
